title: Create Aeronautics: Transmission & Linkage
description: An Aeronautics expansion mod that adds items useful for designing vehicles, as well as practical utility items such as universal joints and kinetic converters.
body:
Create Aeronautics: Transmission & Linkage adds mechanical linkage parts for connecting, constraining, and transferring motion between moving Create Aeronautics structures.

The mod includes universal joints, hydraulic rods, hinge heads, pneumatic regulators, and kinetic conversion bearings. Universal joints and joint rods allow separate physics structures to stay connected while still permitting controlled movement. Hydraulic rods provide adjustable extension, damping, return force, and redstone-controlled target length through pneumatic regulators.

Kinetic conversion bearings convert the rotation of an attached Aeronautics physics structure into Create kinetic output, allowing moving machines to interact more naturally with shafts and mechanical power networks.

The mod is designed for experimental mechanical builds such as aircraft mechanisms, folding structures, suspension systems, powered hinges, stabilizers, and other contraptions that need more than simple static blocks. Main blocks include in-game Ponder scenes, and several behavior values can be tuned through NeoForge config files.


![A universal joint fully compatible with physical structures, with exquisite animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acb94fe79ca8417f29152fa055c8d33c1c0b9e96_0.webp)
![A machine that converts kinetic energy into stress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e216e80afc68ecbc87bf32736b2ba46a2cd9c029_0.webp)
![Crane excavator using hydraulic arms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7db779426031debc28b7c3e142a4ec1b5658c8f_0.webp)
![Exquisite Art System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21edb2aa833ad2763f7749626a12233ac4bb326d_0.webp)
![Anshan Alloy Universal Joint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20f3b61b9e83b4bc4b8f68c03047fde84cd86c47_0.webp)
![all item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24937248f1139bee2a8fee4a44daf8fdac6cb8ec_0.webp)

Complete physical structure support and exquisite animation；You can use it to manufacture hydraulic cranes, retractors, and even automobile suspensions.Inspire Creativity and Imagination

航空学拓展模组，添加了部分有利于设计载具的物件，抑或是实用的物件，例如万向节或动能转换器。液压杆
